fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly converts floating-point shares to integers by simple truncation on line 65. This discards the fractional parts, causing the sum of the final allocations to be less than the total budget.

constraints.intent: The sum of integer allocations must equal the integer part of the total budget.
The sum of planned shares from the helper function must equal the total budget.
The total value lost during integer truncation must be less than one unit.
